ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Player's last name */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Player's first name */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Player's position on the team */,
  "batting_throwing_id" INTEGER /* Player's batting and throwing preference */,
  "height_in" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "height_ft" TEXT /* Player's height in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "eligibility_id" INTEGER /* Player's eligibility status */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Player's academic classification */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Player's high school */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the player is participating in */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "major" TEXT /* Player's academic major */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Player's current grade point average */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the player has */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Player's contact information (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information (e.g., name, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_batting_throwing_id FOREIGN KEY ("batting_throwing_id") REFERENCES batting_throwing ("bt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_eligibility_id FOREIGN KEY ("eligibility_id") REFERENCES eligibility ("eligibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., RHP, LHP, INF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport associated with the position */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the position is a primary position for the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_throwing" (
  "bt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting and throwing preference */,
  "bt_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., R-R, L-L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the preference */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport associated with the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_throwing_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eligibility" (
  "eligibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eligibility status */,
  "eligibility_status" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of the eligibility status (e.g., 1 for freshmen, 5 for seniors) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the eligibility status */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is compliant with NCAA regulations */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for any non-compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eligibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic classification (e.g., FR, SO, JR, SR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the academic classification */,
  "credits_completed" INTEGER /* Number of credits completed by the player */,
  "expected_graduation" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, administrator, trainer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the player information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the player information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., Baseball, Basketball) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Red Hawks, Blue Devils) */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the team plays */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach for the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)
